args.code: (() => { const allInputs = [...document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea, [contenteditable]')].map((i, idx) => ({idx, tag: i.tagName, type: i.type, name: i.name, placeholder: i.placeholder, id: i.id, class: i.className.substring(0,50), 'aria-label': i.getAttribute('aria-label'), text: i.textContent ? i.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) : ''})); return {allInputs: allInputs.slice(0,20)}; })()
